name: Fruit Punch 1
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Frozen OJ concentrate, sugar free (.35 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pitcher, combine the soft drink mix and water; stir well.
2. Add the orange juice concentrate; stir well.
3. When ready to serve, pour into a punch bowl and add the white soda.
Yield: 20 servings (5 quarts)
